title: [MTR4] PCMA & LRR
description: Pasow City, the Capital of Muchav. Everything is Iconic, and that Extends to it's Metro System
body:
Pasow City, the Capital of Muchav. Everything is Iconic, and that Extends to it's Metro System. From the Towers of the east, to the plains from the west, The metro connects the city, and it's people. Spanning 10 Historic railways, A Commuter rail network, and Trams.

This Resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the Trains from the network, plus stock from the Nearby LLR.

Contains Assets from [The PäRail Trains Addon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dragon_railway)
